results.rendered_html:
prahāsin a.
1 Causing laughter, amusing, diverting.
2 Joking, jesting.
3 Smiling with;  Māl. 9. 15. 
4 Shining, resplendent;  Ku. 5. 37. 
5 Satirical.
— m. A jester, buffoon.
